nasb.text: And the ten horns which you saw, and the beast, these will hate the harlot and will make her desolate and naked, and will eat her flesh and will burn her up with fire.

esv.text: And the ten horns that you saw, they and the beast will hate the prostitute. They will make her desolate and naked, and devour her flesh and burn her up with fire,

cnv.text: 你看見的十角和那獸，都要恨那淫婦，使她荒涼赤身，又要吃她的肉，用火把她燒掉。

ccb.text: 怪兽和它头上的十角必憎恨那淫妇，使她赤身露体、景况凄凉。它们要吃她的肉，最后用火将她烧尽。

csbs.text: 你所看见的那十只角和那兽，他们将恨恶那淫妇，并且将使她成为荒芜、赤身露体，又要吃她的肉，而且用火烧掉她。
